name: 5.6x4_4
x_algo: x*key_1u + (3 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0)
y_algo: -y*key_1u - (12 if x == 0 else (10 if x == 1 else (2 if x == 2 else ((x-3)*4 if x >= 4 else 0))))
z_algo: 30-(x*2)-(y*2) if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 10+ abs(y-2)*3 - (2 if x == 2 else 5 if x == 3 else 2 if x == 4 else -2 if x == 0 else 0)
y_rot_algo: 8 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0
x_rot_algo: (y-1)*4 if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 10 if y == 0 else 5 if y == 1 else -5 if y == 3 else 0
z_rot_algo: -2*x if x > 5 or (x == 5 and y == 4) else 0
